claims.subject: HelixPay
claims.evidence: Our reporting is per-merchant and they need to manually consolidate 47 exports every month.
claims.object_value: per-merchant reporting only; no group-level aggregated/multi-property reporting

claims.subject: Cosmos Hotels
claims.evidence: Multi-property reporting. Cosmos has 47 properties across 3 countries and they need group-level aggregated reporting — by property, by country, by P&L center.

claims.subject: Cosmos Hotels

claims.subject: multi-property reporting gap
claims.evidence: I flagged it to Hannah's team in May 2025. It went on the roadmap and stayed there.

claims.subject: Cosmos Hotels CFO
claims.evidence: Cosmos's CFO told me bluntly that the multi-property thing was disqualifying unless we could commit to a build with a hard date in 2026.
claims.object_value: required committed build date in 2026 for multi-property reporting
